revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]][[category:Categories created from enwiki title]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] <!--this is here to get the bot to work--> "
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:Category:" to "[[en:Category:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:Category:Category:" to "[[ja:Category:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==English Content== {{Commons}}
[[ab:Category:Академиатә еимакқәа]] [[ab:Category:Акатегориа:Академиатә еимакқәа]] [[ar:Category:تصنيف:خلافات أكاديمية]] [[ar:Category:خلافات أكاديمية]] [[bn:Category:উচ্চশিক্ষায়তনিক বিতর্কিত বিষয়]] [[bn:Category:বিষয়শ্রেণী:উচ্চশিক্ষায়তনিক বিতর্কিত বিষয়]] [[category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[commons:Category:Academic controversies]] [[commons:Category:Category:Academic controversies]] [[en:Academic controversies]] [[en:Category:Academic controversies]] [[en:Category:Academic controversies]] [[eu:Category:Eztabaida akademikoak]] [[eu:Category:Kategoria:Eztabaida akademikoak]] [[hr:Category:Akademske kontroverze]] [[hr:Category:Kategorija:Akademske kontroverze]] [[id:Category:Kategori:Kontroversi akademik]] [[id:Category:Kontroversi akademik]] [[ja:Category:学術論争]] [[ja:Category:学術論争]] [[ka:Category:აკადემიური კამათი]] [[ka:Category:კატეგორია:აკადემიური კამათი]] [[mk:Category:Академски спорови]] [[mk:Category:Категорија:Академски спорови]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:日本の歴史論争]] [[sq:Category:Kategoria:Polemika akademike]] [[sq:Category:Polemika akademike]] [[vi:Category:Thể loại:Tranh cãi học thuật]] [[vi:Category:Tranh cãi học thuật]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
==English Content== {{Commons}} [[ab:Category:Академиатә еимакқәа]] [[ab:Category:Акатегориа:Академиатә еимакқәа]] [[ar:Category:تصنيف:خلافات أكاديمية]] [[ar:Category:خلافات أكاديمية]] [[bn:Category:উচ্চশিক্ষায়তনিক বিতর্কিত বিষয়]] [[bn:Category:বিষয়শ্রেণী:উচ্চশিক্ষায়তনিক বিতর্কিত বিষয়]] [[category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[co:commons:Category:Academic controversies]] [[co:commons:Category:Category:Academic controversies]] [[en:Academic controversies]] [[en:Category:Academic controversies]] [[en:Category:Academic controversies]] [[eu:Category:Eztabaida akademikoak]] [[eu:Category:Kategoria:Eztabaida akademikoak]] [[hr:Category:Akademske kontroverze]] [[hr:Category:Kategorija:Akademske kontroverze]] [[id:Category:Kategori:Kontroversi akademik]] [[id:Category:Kontroversi akademik]] [[ja:Category:学術論争]] [[ja:Category:学術論争]] [[ka:Category:აკადემიური კამათი]] [[ka:Category:კატეგორია:აკადემიური კამათი]] [[mk:Category:Академски спорови]] [[mk:Category:Категорија:Академски спорови]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:日本の歴史論争]] [[sq:Category:Kategoria:Polemika akademike]] [[sq:Category:Polemika akademike]] [[vi:Category:Thể loại:Tranh cãi học thuật]] [[vi:Category:Tranh cãi học thuật]]
